---
title: "Temperature Analysis"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Reading in the data

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)
library(magrittr) 
library(tidyverse)
library(tidytext)
library(googlesheets4)
```

## Read in the Data

```{r}
journals <- read_csv("../data/journals_all.csv") 

journal_data <- journals |>
  select(date_mdy, journal_year, month, journal_entry, location, local_place, latitude, longitude) 
```

## Explorations

How many journal entries mention Thermometer or degrees?

```{r}
journal_data <- journal_data |>
  mutate(temp_reported = str_detect(journal_entry, pattern = "Thermometer|thermometer"),
         degree_reported = str_detect(journal_entry, pattern = "degree|°"))
```


## Temperature

```{r}

test_entries <- c("The wind North West Thermometer from 32° up to 40 degrees very pleasant.",
                  "Wind South West fresh breeze. Commenced putting fore foot on the Black Warrior work untill noon left on account of tide Thermometer 40",
                  "The wind Westerly. Thermometer about 59 degrees work about home.",
                  "The wind North East Thermometer 15 degrees below zero at 8 oclock A.M",
                  "The wind North West The Thermometer from 0 to 6 above. Wrote letter to C C Burrill.",
                  "Ther. 28 degrees",
                  "The Thermometer. 38 degrees to 42 degrees above zero.",
                  "The wind North West thermometer 32° in morning work.",
                  "Thermometer in morn 28",
                  "The wind North East. Thermometer 28° overcast.",
                  "The wind West North West Thermometer. from 12 to 16",
                  "Thermometer down to zero",
                  "Thermometer at noon 18 degrees")

```

## Extract the temperature

```{r}

temp_pattern1 <- regex(
  paste0(
    "\\b(?:thermometer?\\.?)(?=\\s)",          # thermometer
    "\\s*",
    "(?:from\\s*)?",                           # optional from
    "(?:stood\\s*)?",                          # optional stood
    "(?:at\\s*)?",                             # optional at
    "(?:from\\s*)?",                           # optional about
    "(?:noon\\s*)?",                           # optional noon
    "(?:down\\s+to\\s*)?",                     # optional down to
    "(?:up\\s+to\\s*)?",                       # optional up to
    "(?:in\\s+(?:the\\s+)?morn(?:ing)\\s*)?",      # optional in morning / in the morning
    "(?:at\\s*)?",                             # optional at    
    "\\d+",                                    # first temperature
    "\\s*",
    "(?:°|\\*|degrees?)?",                     # optional degree symbol/star/degrees
    "\\s*",
    "(?:(?:up\\s+to|to|down\\s+to)\\s*\\d+)?"             # optional second temperature
  ),
  ignore_case = TRUE
)

temp_pattern <- regex(
  paste0(
    "\\b(?:thermometer|ther\\.?)",              # Thermometer, Ther, Ther.
    "\\b\\.?",                                  # optional period
    "(?:\\s+\\w+){0,8}?",                       # allow short phrase after thermometer
    "\\s*",
    "(?:from\\s*)?",                            # optional from
    "(?:about|abt\\.?|at|was|being|stood|standing|ranging|went|down|up|most|almost|only)*\\s*",
    "(?:from\\s*)?",
    "(\\d+)",                                   # first temp
    "\\s*(?:°|\\*|'|degrees?|degree)?",         # temp marker
    "\\s*",
    "(?:(?:up\\s+to|down\\s+to|to)\\s*(\\d+))?",# optional second temp
    "\\s*(?:°|\\*|'|degrees?|degree)?"
  ),
  ignore_case = TRUE
)

below_zero_pattern <- regex(
  paste0(
    "\\b(?:thermometer|ther\\.?)",
    ".*?",
    "(?:below\\s*(?:zero|0)|below\\b)"
  ),
  ignore_case = TRUE
)

extract_temps <- function(x) {
  
    x <- str_replace_all(
    x,
    regex("zero", ignore_case = TRUE),
    "0"
  )
  
  temp_text <- str_extract_all(x, temp_pattern)

  map(
    temp_text,
    \(matches) {
      str_extract_all(matches, "\\d+") |>
        unlist() |>
        as.numeric()
    }
  )
}

```

```{r test-temperatures}

tibble(journal_entry = test_entries) |>
  mutate(temp_values = extract_temps(journal_entry)) |>
  unnest_wider(
    temp_values,
    names_sep = "_",
    names_repair = "unique"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    below_zero = str_detect(journal_entry, below_zero_pattern),
    below_zero = replace_na(below_zero, FALSE)
    )
```


```{r}

journal_temp_data <- journal_data |>
  mutate(
    below_zero = str_detect(journal_entry, below_zero_pattern),
    below_zero = replace_na(below_zero, FALSE),
    temp_values = extract_temps(journal_entry),
    temp_values = map2(
      temp_values,
      below_zero,
      \(temps, below_zero) {
        if (isTRUE(below_zero)) -temps else temps
      }
    ),
    temp_mentioned = map_lgl(temp_values, ~ length(.x) > 0)
  ) |>
  unnest_wider(
    temp_values,
    names_sep = "_",
    names_repair = "unique"
  )

temp_check <- journal_temp_data |> filter(temp_reported == TRUE & is.na(temp_values_1))

degree_check <- journal_temp_data |> filter(degree_reported == TRUE & is.na(temp_values_1))
 #3d degree, Third degree, some mispellings of thermometer
```

```{r}
temp_ts <- journal_temp_data |>
  mutate(
    temp_first = as.numeric(temp_values_1)
  ) |>
  filter(
    !is.na(date_mdy),
    !is.na(temp_first)
  ) |>
  filter(year(date_mdy) < max(journal_year))

temp_ts_check <- temp_ts |>
  select(date_mdy, month, journal_entry, below_zero, temp_values_1)

temp_time_series <- ggplot(temp_ts, aes(x = date_mdy, y = temp_first, color = year)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.6) +
  labs(
    title = "Extracted Temperature Over Time",
    subtitle = "First extracted temperature value from each journal entry",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Temperature"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) |>
  facet_wrap(~month)

temp_time_series

ggsave(
  filename = "../figures/first_extracted_temperature_time_series.png",
  plot = temp_time_series,
  width = 11,
  height = 6,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)
```

```{r}
## What proportion of days with journal entries include a temperature?

temp_reporting_prop <- journal_temp_data |>
  mutate(year = lubridate::year(date_mdy)) |>
  filter(year <= max(journal_year)) |>
  group_by(year) |>
  summarise(
    total_entries = n(),
    temp_entries = sum(!is.na(temp_values_1)),
    therm_entries = sum(temp_reported == TRUE),
    prop_temp = temp_entries / total_entries,
    prop_therm = therm_entries / total_entries
  )

ggplot(temp_reporting_prop) +
  geom_line(aes(year, prop_temp), alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_line(aes(year, prop_therm), color = "blue", alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_point(aes(year, prop_temp), alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_point(aes(year, prop_therm), color = "blue", alpha = 0.3) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(
    title = "Proportion of Journal Entries Reporting Temperature",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Proportion of entries"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
```

## Some open questions:

Where and when did he report temperature?

## Plotting a heatmap

```{r heatmap of temp}
temp_reporting_monthly <- journal_data |>
  mutate(
    year = lubridate::year(date_mdy),
    month = factor(month, levels = month.name)
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(temp_values_1)) |>
  count(year, month)

ggplot(temp_reporting_monthly,
       aes(x = month, y = factor(year), fill = n)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = "Days") +
  labs(
    title = "Temperature Reporting Frequency",
    x = "Month",
    y = "Year"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )
```
